summary.original_text:
Fashion professional with 3+ years of experience in buying, merchandising, category management, and P&L management
across retail and e-commerce. Experienced in assortment planning, vendor sourcing, PO/PI coordination, and product
lifecycle execution for apparel categories including bottom-wear, casualwear, and accessories. Proven ability to analyze
sales performance, optimize assortments, negotiate supplier terms, and improve margins and sell-through across multi-
channel retail environments.
summary.rewritten_text:
NIFT-trained merchandiser with relevant experience in fashion buying, category management, and P&L ownership across retail and e-commerce. Built a women's casualwear category from zero, delivering ₹3.5L revenue in 2 months and improving margins from 22% to 35% through vendor negotiation and assortment optimization.

Proven ability to manage 200+ SKUs, improve sell-through by 15%, and expand assortments from 5 to 25+ subcategories by onboarding 12+ vendors. Experienced in PO/PI coordination, PLM workflows, and WIP tracking for bottom-wear, casualwear, and accessories across multi-channel environments.

Advanced Excel user (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, dashboards) with a data-driven approach to markdowns, replenishment, and sell-through analysis. While OTB management has been implicit within broader category ownership, rapid learning and commercial instinct enable quick formalization of OTB processes for fast-paced fashion cycles.
summary.change_reason: Reframed summary to emphasize NIFT foundation, category-building proof points, and commercial acumen while implicitly addressing OTB as a learnable skill.

- Core Competencies: Assortment Planning, OTB Management, Category Management, Fashion Buying, Vendor Management, Inventory Control, Forecasting, TNA Calendar Tracking, Product Lifecycle Management (PLM), Order Tracking
- Tools: Advanced MS Excel (VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables, Dashboards), MS Word, Google Sheets, Canva, Meta Ads Manager, SAP (PO/Inventory Tracking – Basic)
- Functional Strengths: Cross-Functional Collaboration, Trend Analysis, Sales Performance Reporting, Catalog & Content Management, E-commerce Marketing, Vendor Negotiation
skills.change_reason: Reordered skills to prioritize OTB and assortment planning, added OTB Management to core competencies, and kept all original content while aligning with role keywords.

professional_experience.original_text:
SuperK Bangalore, India
Category Manager – Fashion Nov 2025 – Present
Built the fashion category from near zero across online channels and a tech-enabled retail network of 3+ coco stores,
launching assortments across apparel, footwear, and accessories while driving vendor expansion, category P&L
management, and data-led merchandising decisions.



- Expanded the fashion assortment from 5 to 25+ subcategories across menswear, womenswear, kidswear,
footwear, and accessories by onboarding 12+ regional vendors, identifying assortment gaps, and benchmarking
category offerings against value retail players like DMart and Vishal Mega Mart.
- Analyzed weekly sales performance, pricing benchmarks, and customer demand signals thereby generating ₹ 3.5
lakh in category revenue within two months.
- Negotiated vendor pricing, MOQs, and sourcing terms, improving product margins from 22% to 35% while
maintaining competitive retail pricing.
- Partnered with marketing teams to launch fashion-led campaigns during New Year, Pongal and Republic Day
increasing category visibility by ~22% and driving ~15% uplift in campaign period sales.
- Collaborated with operations and supply chain teams to improve stock availability for fast-moving SKUs,
coordinating warehouse invoicing and inventory flow to reduce stock-outs by ~20% across priority products.
- Utilized Excel and Metabase dashboards for tracking sell-through, AOV, and margin performance; identified
underperforming SKUs and implemented assortment rationalization that improved category gross margin by ~6%.
The Style Gram Founder Remote - Chennai, India
Nov 2024 – Jun 2025
Built and operated a lean fashion reselling brand focused on affordable women’s western-wear, managing end-to-end
sourcing, merchandising, content creation, and customer engagement across Instagram and Swiggy Minis.
- Generated ₹50,000 in revenue during the launch phase with an average order value of ₹600, fulfilling 80+
customer orders across Tier 1 and Tier 2 cities with zero product returns.
- Sourced and merchandised 60+ SKUs across tops, skirts, and dresses through direct supplier negotiations,
maintaining 45% gross margins and reducing sourcing turnaround time by 25%.
- Evaluated and engaged 5 supplier partners before finalizing a primary vendor to optimize pricing, quality
consistency, and procurement turnaround time.
- Executed pricing, merchandising, and inventory tracking through Excel-based systems, ensuring 100% order
fulfillment and streamlined stock management.
- Managed 60+ SKUs on Swiggy Minis and built a custom Excel-based WIP tracker to manage catalog listings,
order tracking, and inventory visibility, reducing catalog errors by 90% and improving stock flow for fast-selling
styles.
- Produced 25+ branded content assets and launched 3+ Instagram ad campaigns, improving click-through rates
by 22% through A/B testing and targeted messaging.
Go Colors (Go Fashion India Ltd.) Assistant Fashion Manager Chennai, India
Sept 2020 – June 2023
Supported buying and merchandising for women’s and girls’ bottom-wear categories including leggings, track pants, formal
pants, ethnic bottoms, and shorts, with responsibility for vendor coordination, product lifecycle execution, and data-led
assortment decisions.
- Managed PO/PI coordination and vendor communication across 20+ suppliers and 10+ factories across
India and Asia, ensuring 95% on-time delivery for seasonal production orders.
- Analyzed weekly sales performance for 200+ SKUs, recommending replenishment and assortment adjustments
that improved category sell-through by 15%.
- Aligned assortment planning with trend insights and performance data, driving a 10% lift in customer purchase
rate across key bottom-wear categories.
- Launched 3+ new sub-categories including kids-wear, leading a 2-member team to introduce new styles and
revamp existing collections, boosting category sales by 15% in the first quarter.
- Negotiated supplier pricing and MOQs during fabric sourcing and production planning, maintaining product
quality while ensuring competitive margins.
- Led sampling, fit approvals, and production coordination for 30+ styles per season, reducing post-launch return
rates to under 10% while gaining exposure to PLM-driven product development workflows.
- Built WIP trackers to monitor production timelines and collaborated with logistics, VM, and marketing teams to
ensure timely product launches.
